heroSubtitle: Fresh pasta, wood-fired pizza, and classic Italian dishes made with love.
about: Family-owned Italian restaurant featuring house-made pasta, traditional recipes, and a warm atmosphere.
specials: Fettuccine Bolognese • Tiramisu • Prosciutto & Arugula Pizza

categoryIntros.Signature Dishes: Our most beloved house specialties, perfected over 40 years.
categoryIntros.Pasta: Fresh pasta made daily, paired with authentic Italian sauces.
categoryIntros.Pizza: Wood-fired pizzas with San Marzano tomatoes and imported cheeses.
categoryIntros.Lunch: Quick and satisfying Italian sandwiches on house-baked bread.
categoryIntros.Desserts: Sweet endings to your Italian feast.
